checks.description: M-01 fix: Assert all ref-period rows have started_at in [2022-08-29, 2023-01-01) and all tested frequencies are in their declared quarter. NOT vacuous match-id disjointness check.
checks.sql_ref_bound:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS rows_in_ref_outside_bound
FROM matches_history_minimal
WHERE started_at >= TIMESTAMP '2022-08-29'
  AND started_at <  TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01'
  AND (started_at < TIMESTAMP '2022-08-29' OR started_at >= TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01')
checks.sql_test_bound:
SELECT quarter, n, n_outside_bound
FROM (
    SELECT
        CONCAT(CAST(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM started_at) AS VARCHAR), '-Q',
               CAST(CEIL(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM started_at) / 3.0) AS INTEGER)::VARCHAR) AS quarter,
        COUNT(*) AS n,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (
            WHERE started_at < TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01'
               OR started_at >= TIMESTAMP '2025-01-01'
        ) AS n_outside_bound
    FROM matches_history_minimal
    WHERE started_at >= TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01'
      AND started_at <  TIMESTAMP '2025-01-01'
    GROUP BY 1
) sub
WHERE n_outside_bound > 0

checks.description: AST/regex scan of T03/T04 notebooks for POST_GAME tokens in pre-game feature selection contexts.
Assert T03 JSON frozen_reference_edges.ref_start == '2022-08-29' and ref_end == '2022-12-31' (spec §7).
